user.title: Connect to Busch-Radio iNet
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Busch-Radio iNet device. Make sure the Energy Mode is set to 'Premium' (not Eco).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Please check the IP address and ensure Energy Mode is set to Premium.

init.title: Integration Settings
init.description: Configure ICY stream metadata and device settings exposure.

data.expose_http_settings: Expose device settings as HA entities

data_description.icy_mode: Interval: reconnects periodically. Live: holds connection open (~16 KB/s).
data_description.http_poll_interval: How often to read settings from the device. Only relevant when 'Expose device settings' is enabled.
